home.title: Home
home.subtitle: Desktop AI dictation, ready when you are.
home.permissionsDesc: Grant microphone and accessibility access to enable dictation into any app.
home.recordingOverlayHint: Use the floating overlay or press {{shortcut}} to stop.
home.recordingHint: Speak naturally. Your words will be transcribed and cleaned by AI.
home.recordingStartHint: Press {{shortcut}} from any app, or start here.
history.title: History
history.emptyDesc: Record your first dictation from the Home tab. Sessions will appear here with full transcripts and pipeline details.
dictionary.title: Dictionary
dictionary.subtitle: Custom words and phrases for better accuracy.
dictionary.emptyDesc: Add specialized terms, abbreviations, and names to improve transcription accuracy. This feature is coming in a future update.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Permissions, shortcuts, and system configuration.
status.microphoneUnavailable: Microphone access unavailable. Open System Settings to grant.
status.accessibilityUnavailable: Open System Settings and enable OpenTypeless under Accessibility.
status.openedSettings: Opened {{kind}} settings. Grant access, then return here.
status.shortcutStarted: Global shortcut started recording. Speak, then press stop.
status.noTargetApp: Processed, but no external target app was available for insertion.
status.noMicrophone: This environment does not support microphone capture.
onboarding.welcome.title: Welcome to OpenTypeless
onboarding.welcome.description: Press a shortcut, speak, and your words appear wherever you're typing.
onboarding.permissions.title: Grant Permissions
onboarding.permissions.description: OpenTypeless needs microphone access to hear you and accessibility access to type for you.
onboarding.shortcuts.title: Your Shortcut
onboarding.shortcuts.description: Press {{shortcut}} anywhere to start recording. Press again to stop.
onboarding.tryit.title: Let's Try It!
onboarding.tryit.waiting: Waiting for you to press the shortcut...
onboarding.restartGuideDesc: Walk through the setup guide again.
onboarding.permissionLost.title: Permission Lost
onboarding.permissionLost.description: {{permissions}} has been revoked. Dictation won't work until it's restored.
